YouTube: Watch, Listen, Stream.summary:
Data Used to Track You:
The app introduced a tracking section that uses contact details like your physical address, email, and phone number, as well as device and user identifiers, to monitor your activity across other companies apps and websites.

Data Linked to You:
The app expanded its data collection to link specific contact information to your identity for advertising and marketing purposes, though it removed search history from the app functionality category. Precise location and purchase history remain linked to your identity for personalization and analytics.
